name: Caterpillar Cake
recipeInstructions: A little recipe that is good is caterpillar cake for kids. Make pudding and frost refrigerator cookies and keep stacking till you have a large green and brown log (do this on a piece of waxed paper). Then roll up in the waxed paper, cover with foil and freeze till firm-will keep up to a month in freezer. When you bring it out, place on plate frozen and frost with whipped cream, you can tint it if you want. Use milk duds for eyes and red licorice whips for ears and decorate with what you want. Some use coconut on top. Serve frozen like a Baskin Robbins ice cream cake.
